# Plan — 2026-05-18

## Summary

Based on the research report from 2026-05-18, all 5 items from the previous cycle (2026-05-16) are resolved. The new gaps identified come from Claude Code v2.1.139-143 and Cline v3.0.3-v3.0.7. This plan creates 5 issues targeting the prioritized features.

## Issues created

| # | Title | Size | Category |
|---|-------|------|----------|
| 1 | #412 [mcp] Add configurable timeout to MCP tool calls | small | mcp |
| 2 | #411 [command] Add --worktree CLI flag for task isolation | medium | command |
| 3 | #414 [core] Preserve user instructions during compaction | small | core |
| 4 | #410 [command] Goal-driven autonomous loop (/goal command) | medium | command |
| 5 | #413 [command] Rewind and partial summarize commands | medium | command |

## Implementation Notes

### 1. MCP Tool Call Timeout (small, < 4h)
- **Modify**: `src/mcp/client.ts` — Wrap `connection.client.callTool()` at line 391 with `AbortSignal.timeout()` or `Promise.race` pattern
- **Modify**: `src/mcp/config.ts` — Add optional `timeout?: number` field to `McpServerConfig`
- **Add constant**: `DEFAULT_TOOL_CALL_TIMEOUT_MS = 60000`
- **Env var**: Read `MCP_TOOL_TIMEOUT` from environment to override default
- **Tests**: `tests/mcp/client.test.ts` — Test timeout behavior, default fallback, per-server config, env var override

### 2. CLI --worktree Flag (medium, 1-2 days)
- **Create**: `src/utils/gitWorktree.ts` — Utility to create/cleanup git worktrees
- **Modify**: `src/cli/commands/interactive.ts` — Add `--worktree` flag
- **Modify**: `src/cli/commands/agent.ts` — Add `--worktree` flag
- **Logic**: Create detached-HEAD worktree at `~/.alexi/worktrees/<uuid>/<repoName>/`, set as workdir, cleanup on exit
- **Tests**: `tests/utils/gitWorktree.test.ts` — Test create, cleanup, error handling

### 3. Compaction Instruction Preservation (small, < 4h)
- **Modify**: `src/compaction/index.ts` — Enhance `SUMMARY_PROMPT` at line 105 to explicitly instruct the model to preserve user instructions, preferences, constraints, and configuration details verbatim
- **Modify**: `src/core/compaction.ts` — Same enhancement to `SUMMARY_PROMPT` at line 42 for consistency
- **Tests**: `tests/compaction/index.test.ts` — Verify prompt includes preservation instructions

### 4. Goal-Driven Autonomous Loop (medium, 1-2 days)
- **Create**: `src/core/goalEvaluator.ts` — Goal definition interface, success criteria evaluation
- **Modify**: `src/core/agenticChat.ts` — Add goal evaluation after each iteration, retry logic
- **Modify**: `src/cli/tui/hooks/useCommands.ts` — Add `/goal` slash command
- **Modify**: `src/cli/commands/agent.ts` — Add `--goal` CLI flag for non-interactive use
- **Tests**: `tests/core/goalEvaluator.test.ts` — Test goal evaluation, retry, termination

### 5. Rewind / Partial Summarize (medium, 1-2 days)
- **Modify**: `src/core/sessionManager.ts` — Add `rewind(n)` and `partialSummarize(fromIdx, toIdx)` methods
- **Modify**: `src/cli/tui/hooks/useCommands.ts` — Add `/rewind [n]` and `/summarize-before [n]` slash commands
- **Modify**: `src/compaction/index.ts` — Add `partialCompact()` function for range-based summarization
- **Integrate**: Link undo system (`src/undo/index.ts`) with rewind for file state rollback
- **Tests**: `tests/core/sessionManager.test.ts` — Test rewind, partial summarize, file rollback
